title: [Legend 50] Language Change DFU — Headset Updates, Charge Case Skipped (Asymmetric Update)
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Legend 50 connected to Poly Studio Mobile app. Headset FW v1.0, Charge Case FW v1.0.
Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Language
Change language from English to French
Observe DFU prompt appears for headset
Tap 'Update' on headset DFU prompt
Wait for headset DFU to complete successfully
After headset DFU completes, observe if a second DFU prompt appears for Charge Case
Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Version
Read the displayed Charge Case firmware version
expected: Expected: Headset DFU completes successfully. A separate DFU prompt for Charge Case appears after headset update. Charge Case firmware version in Device Settings reflects the updated version. Actual (If Bug): Headset DFU completes, but Charge Case DFU is never triggered — no prompt appears. Charge Case firmware version in Device Settings remains at pre-update version (v1.0), confirming the case was silently skipped during language-change DFU.

title: [Legend 50] Language Change DFU — Immediate State Trigger: Kill App Mid-DFU on Headset, Verify Case State
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Legend 50 connected. Headset FW v1.0, Charge Case FW v1.0.
Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Language
Change language from English to German
Tap 'Update' on headset DFU prompt
Immediately after headset DFU starts (within 2 seconds), force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app
Reopen the app and reconnect to Legend 50
Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Version
Check both Headset and Charge Case firmware versions
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → verify any audio setting (e.g., ANC toggle) is functional
expected: Expected: App reconnects and shows headset firmware may be partially updated or rolled back depending on DFU atomicity. Charge Case firmware version remains at v1.0 (unchanged). Audio settings remain functional. Actual (If Bug): App shows headset as updated but charge case version is missing or shows stale v1.0, and no recovery/retry DFU is offered for the case — the asymmetric update is silently accepted.

title: [Legend 50] Language Change DFU — Post-DFU UI Data Accuracy: Charge Case Firmware Version Display
steps: Precondition: Legend 50 connected. Headset FW v1.0, Charge Case FW v1.0.
Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Language
Change language from English to Spanish
Complete headset DFU when prompted
If Charge Case DFU prompt appears, dismiss/ignore it (do not update)
Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Version
Take screenshot of the firmware version screen
Navigate away to Home screen, then back to Device → Device Settings → Firmware Version
Compare the Charge Case firmware version displayed
expected: Expected: Charge Case firmware version is displayed accurately and consistently across navigation cycles. If case was not updated, version remains v1.0. If case was updated, version reflects new version. The displayed version must match the actual case firmware. Actual (If Bug): Charge Case firmware version field shows stale data (v1.0) even if case was updated, OR shows a blank/placeholder value, OR the version changes between navigation cycles due to stale cache.

title: [Legend 50] Language Change DFU — Deep Lifecycle: Bluetooth Disconnect During Headset Update, Verify Case State After Reconnect
steps: Precondition: Legend 50 connected. Headset FW v1.0, Charge Case FW v1.0.
Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Language
Change language from English to Italian
Tap 'Update' on headset DFU prompt
During headset DFU (at ~50% progress), manually disconnect Legend 50 via phone Bluetooth settings
Wait 10 seconds
Reconnect Legend 50 via Bluetooth
Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe any DFU recovery/resume prompt
Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Version
Check Headset and Charge Case firmware versions
expected: Expected: App detects interrupted DFU and offers to resume/retry headset update. Charge Case firmware version remains at v1.0 (unchanged). After recovery, both components should be updated consistently. Actual (If Bug): App silently accepts the interrupted state — headset shows partial/updated version, charge case shows v1.0, and no recovery DFU is offered. The asymmetric state persists without user notification.

title: [Legend 50] Language Change DFU — Phone Reboot After Headset Update, Verify Case Persistence
steps: Precondition: Legend 50 connected. Headset FW v1.0, Charge Case FW v1.0.
Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Language
Change language from English to Portuguese
Complete headset DFU when prompted
If Charge Case DFU prompt appears, dismiss it
Reboot the phone
After phone restart, open Poly Studio Mobile app
Reconnect to Legend 50
Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Version
Check Charge Case firmware version
Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Language and verify the language is set to Portuguese
expected: Expected: After phone reboot, app reconnects and correctly displays Charge Case firmware version (v1.0 if not updated). Language setting persists as Portuguese. Actual (If Bug): Charge Case firmware version field shows incorrect data (e.g., blank, or shows headset version instead of case version), or language reverts to English, indicating the language-change DFU was not fully committed across components.

title: [Legend 50] Language Change DFU — No Prompt for Charge Case When Headset Update Fails
steps: Precondition: Legend 50 connected. Headset FW v1.0, Charge Case FW v1.0. Phone in Airplane Mode (simulate DFU failure).
Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Language
Change language from English to Dutch
Tap 'Update' on headset DFU prompt
Allow headset DFU to fail (due to no network / timeout)
Observe error message on screen
After failure, turn off Airplane Mode
Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Version
Check Headset and Charge Case firmware versions
Attempt to trigger language change DFU again by toggling language back to English
expected: Expected: Headset DFU failure is reported with an error message. Charge Case firmware version remains at v1.0 (unchanged). Retrying language change triggers a fresh DFU attempt for the headset. Actual (If Bug): After headset DFU failure, a Charge Case DFU prompt incorrectly appears (treating the headset as updated), OR no retry is offered for the headset, leaving both components in an inconsistent state.

title: [Legend 50] Language Change DFU — Verify Charge Case Is Not Enumerated as Updatable Component
steps: Precondition: Legend 50 connected. Headset FW v1.0, Charge Case FW v1.0.
Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Version
Note the components listed (Headset, Charge Case)
Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Language
Change language from English to French
When DFU prompt appears, read the component description carefully
Note which components are listed for update
Complete the DFU
Navigate back to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Version
Compare the component list before and after DFU
expected: Expected: The DFU prompt clearly enumerates which components will be updated. If the architecture treats the Charge Case as a non-updatable accessory during language change, the prompt should only list the headset. The firmware version screen should consistently show both components regardless. Actual (If Bug): The DFU prompt ambiguously lists 'device' without specifying components, or the Charge Case is listed but silently skipped during update, or the firmware version screen stops showing the Charge Case entry after DFU.
